title: Kuma’s Life as a Buccaneer
description: On pages 4–6, this part focuses on Sanji, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Bepo, Bonney, Unknown person #6 as Bonney discovers Kuma’s memories, revealing his Buccaneer heritage, Ginny, the Revolutionary Army, God Valley, and the painful origins behind Kuma’s sacrifice.
scene: Bonney discovers Kuma’s memories, revealing his Buccaneer heritage, Ginny, the Revolutionary Army, God Valley, and the painful origins behind Kuma’s sacrifice.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Let's use this chance to capture vegapunk!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There is no need for haste! They have nowhere To Run!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even for you, THAT Took Longer Than expected,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't think I can move... for a little while!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It's ok... I understand the reason why...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You have a pretty strong crew...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Even the world leaders at the top...

dialogue.speaker: Bepo
dialogue.text: Are after my captain's head. Gahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You two joining this battle was def-initely unex- pected.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You are surrounded by Marines on an island on the brink of destruction.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If by some twist of fate you can manage to escape,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It's a shame you betrayed us.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: For all your contributions to The Milli- Tary...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: So tell me, who dies first?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We want you to die in regret for having opposed the world government.

summary: This part advances the Kuma and Bonney’s Tragedy through 32 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
